criteria.description: A bulk-edit mission fails at the finalize-tasks command (WP01) and the live next-loop tasks_finalize guard (WP02) when occurrence_map.yaml is missing/schema-invalid/inadmissible, before implement.
criteria.evidence: tests/tasks/test_finalize_tasks_occurrence_gate.py (8 tests, green) via _validate_occurrence_map_ready in mission_finalize.py; tests/next/test_occurrence_gate_next_loop.py (19 tests, green) via _occurrence_gate_failures in runtime_bridge.py at both tasks_finalize enumerators.
criteria.notes: Independent review approved WP01 (round 1) and WP02 (round 2).

criteria.description: The gate reuses the existing ensure_occurrence_classification_ready enforcement and surfaces its canonical error output; no new validation logic.
criteria.evidence: Both WPs call ensure_occurrence_classification_ready unchanged; fail-case tests assert the canonical gate error is PRESENT (JSON gate_errors / render_gate_failure panel), pass cases assert ABSENT. bulk_edit/gate.py untouched.

criteria.description: Non-bulk-edit missions are unaffected by the gate (no-op on the non-bulk path).
criteria.evidence: Non-bulk / change_mode=standard test cases assert the gate error is ABSENT and finalize proceeds unchanged, in both WP01 (finalize command) and WP02 (next-loop) suites.

criteria.description: The existing implement-time preflight and review-time backstops remain unchanged.
criteria.evidence: implement.py:1241, agent/workflow.py:2371, bulk_edit/gate.py, occurrence_map.py are untouched (diff stays within each WP's owned_files); confirmed in independent review.
